summaries.title: Guard optional orchestrator methods before calling them
summaries.summary: The lesson is to always guard optional orchestrator methods with `typeof ... === "function"` before calling them, as a missing method on an existing parent object can crash an entire endpoint. In this case, `orchestrator.learningGateway.health()` was called unconditionally but wasn't a function, causing a 500 error on the dashboard overview. The fix adds function existence checks and fallback values to prevent such crashes.
